_note: Add a solicitation survey by pasting a block below. When a new survey is deployed in Pendo, add its guide_id and the product area. interested_poll_value defaults to 1 (the Reporting Suite pattern: PositiveNegative poll where 1 = 'I'm Interested'); only set it if a guide differs. Set status to 'live' to pull it, 'planned' to show it as a placeholder card.
